description: Node.js WebGPU benchmark: Doe (@simulatte/webgpu) vs Dawn (webgpu npm)

doe.notes: Doe-native N-API provider backed by libdoe_webgpu

comparability.notes: Both providers measured at JS API boundary via performance.now(). Apples-to-apples: same workload code, same dispatch geometry, same buffer sizes.

claimability.notes: Doe must beat Dawn at both p50 and p95 with ≥19 timed samples.
